response.justification: Bogdan has extensive full-stack engineering experience and exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP, aligning with key requirements, but lacks clear evidence of 8+ years focused on production-grade GenAI or cloud-based RAG systems, and his resume emphasizes diverse legacy projects over modern GenAI tooling like vector databases or LangGraph.
strengths: Demonstrated experience with AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling.
Strong full-stack proficiency in TypeScript/Node.js and cloud platforms (AWS CDK).
Proven leadership in mentoring, workshops, and open-source contributions across decades.
concerns: No explicit mention of vector databases, RAG architectures, or multi-agent frameworks like LangGraph.
Resume spans 30+ years but lacks focused evidence of 8+ years in GenAI or enterprise cloud AI delivery.
Minimal detail on data pipelines, LLM metrics, or production observability for AI systems.
